search_document:
User Request: Products per category.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Products per Category
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of products across different categories
Title: Category Breakdown
Type: table
Description: List of categories with the number of products in each
Title: Total Products
Type: kpi
Description: Total number of products available

sql_queries.title: Products per Category
sql_queries.description: Distribution of products across different categories
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS ProductCount FROM Categories c LEFT JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryName

sql_queries.title: Category Breakdown
sql_queries.description: List of categories with the number of products in each
sql_queries.sql: SELECT c.CategoryName, COUNT(p.ProductID) AS ProductCount FROM Categories c LEFT JOIN Products p ON c.CategoryID = p.CategoryID GROUP BY c.CategoryName

sql_queries.title: Total Products
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(ProductID) AS TotalProducts FROM Products
